name: PRECISION OPTICS CORPORATION, INC.
business: Precision Optics Corporation develops and manufactures advanced optical instruments, including medical devices such as endoscopes and endocouplers, and components for defense/aerospace including satellite network communications. The company operates in medical devices and defense/aerospace markets.

exposures.sentence: We have been manufacturing medical products such as endoscopes and endocouplers since our formation in 1982.
We also manufacture and sell components and assemblies specially designed for defense/aerospace and industrial uses.
We also apply our unique technologies to applications in the Defense / Aerospace markets including applications supporting satellite network communications.
characteristics that make them perfectly suited for medical imaging applications, particularly single-use or disposable endoscopes.

In January 2025, we launched our Unity Imaging Platform ( Unity ), comprising a standard baseline CMOS endoscopic system with customization options based on existing or newly designed modular sub-components.

We design and manufacture ultra-high precision endoscopes and very small Microprecision lenses, assemblies and complete medical devices to meet the surgical community s continuing demand for smaller, disposable, and more enhanced imaging systems for minimally invasive surgery.

Our business may be impacted by disruptions to our own or third-party information technology infrastructure, which could result from, among other causes, cyberattacks on or failures of such infrastructure or compromises to its physical security.
Artificial intelligence presents risks and challenges that can impact our business, including by posing security risks to our confidential information, proprietary information and personal data.

catalysts.sentence: In January 2025, we launched our Unity Imaging Platform ( Unity ), comprising a standard baseline CMOS endoscopic system with customization options based on existing or newly designed modular sub-components.
